title: arenaria nigricans var. zhengkangensis
intro: Arenaria nigricans var. zhengkangensis, also known as Zhengkangensis, is a variety of the Arenaria nigricans plant, which is a flowering plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zhengkangensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and its root is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
